Interface ClientState

All Known Implementing Classes:
BuildingState, ConnectedState, ConnectingState, FlightState, GameSelectedState, GameSelectionState, LobbyState, LoggedInState, LoginState, PlayingState, ProtocolChoiceState, RewardState, UnconfirmedLoginState, UnconfirmedSelectionState
public interface ClientState
Represents the state of the client in a networked game. This interface defines the methods that can be invoked on the client state, including actions for connecting, creating games, joining games, and handling network messages.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default ClientState
    chooseProtocol(String choice)
    Returns the network associated with this client state.
    default ClientState
    connect(String hostname, Integer port)
    Connects to the server with the specified hostname and port.
    default ClientState
    create(MatchLevel matchLevel)
    Creates a new game with the specified match level.
    default List<String>
    getAvailableCommands()
    Returns a list of available commands that can be executed in this state.
    default String
    getUsername()
    Returns the username associated with this client state.
    default boolean
    isDone()
    Checks if the current client state is done.
    default ClientState
    join(int gameId)
    Joins an existing game with the specified game ID.
    default void
    list()
    Lists the available games in a user-friendly format.
    default ClientState
    login(String username)
    Logs in the user with the specified username.
    default ClientState

    Returns a string representation of the current client state.
    default ClientState
    net_JoinFailed()
    Handles the failure of joining a game.
    default ClientState
    net_JoinSuccess(Game game)
    Handles the successful joining of a game.
    default ClientState
    net_Leave(String username)
    Handles the action of leaving a game.
    default ClientState
    net_LoginFailed(String username)
    Handles the failure of logging in.
    default ClientState
    net_LoginSuccess(String username)
    Handles the successful login of a user.
    default ClientState

    Handles the action of rewarding the client.
    default ClientState
    net_Start()
    Handles the action of starting the client.
    default ClientState

    Sends a message to the server.
    default ClientState

    Updates the game state with the provided game instance.

    Views the card associated with the current game.

    Views the component at the specified coordinates for the given username.

    Views the flight board of the current game.
    default void
    viewPlayers()
    Views the players in the current game.
    default void

    Views the rewards available in the current game.
    default void
    viewShipBoard(String username)
    Views the ship board of the player with the specified username.
    default void
    viewTiles()
    Views the tiles in the current game.

  • Method Details

    • getAvailableCommands

      default List<String> getAvailableCommands()
      Returns a list of available commands that can be executed in this state. This method provides the commands that the user can perform based on the current state.
      Returns:
      A list of strings representing the available commands.

    • getUsername

      default String getUsername()
      Returns the username associated with this client state. This method provides access to the username of the player currently in this state.
      Returns:
      The username of the player.

    • chooseProtocol

      default ClientState chooseProtocol(String choice)
      Returns the network associated with this client state. This method provides access to the network connection used by the client.
      Returns:
      The network instance associated with this client state.

    • connect

      default ClientState connect(String hostname, Integer port)
      Connects to the server with the specified hostname and port. This method initiates a connection to the game server.
      Parameters:
      hostname - The hostname of the server to connect to.
      port - The port number of the server to connect to.
      Returns:
      A new ClientState representing the connection state.

    • create

      default ClientState create(MatchLevel matchLevel)
      Creates a new game with the specified match level. This method sends a request to create a game and returns the resulting state.
      Parameters:
      matchLevel - The level of the match to be created.
      Returns:
      A new ClientState representing the game creation state.

    • join

      default ClientState join(int gameId)
      Joins an existing game with the specified game ID. This method sends a request to join a game and returns the resulting state.
      Parameters:
      gameId - The ID of the game to join.
      Returns:
      A new ClientState representing the join game state.

    • login

      default ClientState login(String username)
      Logs in the user with the specified username. This method sends a login request and returns the resulting state.
      Parameters:
      username - The username of the user to log in.
      Returns:
      A new ClientState representing the login state.

    • send

      default ClientState send(Message message)
      Sends a message to the server. This method is used to send various types of messages based on the current state.
      Parameters:
      message - The message to be sent.
      Returns:
      A new ClientState representing the state after sending the message.

    • stop

      default ClientState stop()
      Stops the current client state. This method is used to terminate the current state and return a new state indicating completion.
      Returns:
      A new ClientState representing the stopped state.

    • isDone

      default boolean isDone()
      Checks if the current client state is done. This method indicates whether the current state has completed its operations.
      Returns:
      true if the state is done, false otherwise.

    • net_Fly

      default ClientState net_Fly()
      Returns a string representation of the current client state. This method provides a description of the current state for debugging or logging purposes.
      Returns:
      A string representing the current client state.

    • net_JoinFailed

      default ClientState net_JoinFailed()
      Handles the failure of joining a game. This method is invoked when the client fails to join a game.
      Returns:
      A new ClientState representing the state after a failed join attempt.

    • net_JoinSuccess

      default ClientState net_JoinSuccess(Game game)
      Handles the successful joining of a game. This method is invoked when the client successfully joins a game.
      Parameters:
      game - The game that has been joined.
      Returns:
      A new ClientState representing the state after joining the game.

    • net_Leave

      default ClientState net_Leave(String username)
      Handles the action of leaving a game. This method is invoked when the client leaves a game with the specified username.
      Parameters:
      username - The username of the user leaving the game.
      Returns:
      A new ClientState representing the state after leaving the game.

    • net_LoginFailed

      default ClientState net_LoginFailed(String username)
      Handles the failure of logging in. This method is invoked when the client fails to log in with the specified username.
      Parameters:
      username - The username that failed to log in.
      Returns:
      A new ClientState representing the state after a failed login attempt.

    • net_LoginSuccess

      default ClientState net_LoginSuccess(String username)
      Handles the successful login of a user. This method is invoked when the client successfully logs in with the specified username.
      Parameters:
      username - The username that has successfully logged in.
      Returns:
      A new ClientState representing the state after a successful login.

    • net_Reward

      default ClientState net_Reward()
      Handles the action of rewarding the client. This method is invoked to process rewards in the client state.
      Returns:
      A new ClientState representing the state after processing rewards.

    • net_Start

      default ClientState net_Start()
      Handles the action of starting the client. This method is invoked to initiate the client state.
      Returns:
      A new ClientState representing the started state.

    • net_ViewCardDeck

      default ClientState net_ViewCardDeck(String username)

    • updateGame

      default ClientState updateGame(Game game)
      Updates the game state with the provided game instance. This method is used to refresh the game state in the client.
      Parameters:
      game - The new game instance to update the state with.
      Returns:
      The updated ClientState with the new game.

    • updateList

      default ClientState updateList(Integer[] newGamesList)
      Updates the list of games available in the client state. This method is used to refresh the list of games based on the provided game IDs.
      Parameters:
      newGamesList - An array of integers representing the new list of game IDs.
      Returns:
      The updated ClientState with the new games list.

    • list

      default void list()
      Lists the available games in a user-friendly format. This method collects the game IDs from the gamesList and displays them using the Client's view.

    • viewCard

      default void viewCard()
      Views the card associated with the current game. This method is used to display the card that represents the current game state.

    • viewCardDeck

      default void viewCardDeck()

    • viewComponent

      default void viewComponent(String username, Coordinates coordinates)
      Views the component at the specified coordinates for the given username. This method is used to display a specific component in the game based on its coordinates.
      Parameters:
      username - The username of the player whose component is being viewed.
      coordinates - The coordinates of the component to be viewed.

    • viewFlightBoard

      default void viewFlightBoard()
      Views the flight board of the current game. This method is used to display the flight board, which contains information about the current game state.

    • viewPlayers

      default void viewPlayers()
      Views the players in the current game. This method is used to display the list of players currently in the game.

    • viewRewards

      default void viewRewards()
      Views the rewards available in the current game. This method is used to display the rewards that can be claimed or viewed.

    • viewShipBoard

      default void viewShipBoard(String username)
      Views the ship board of the player with the specified username. If the player does not exist, it sets the view state to ViewFlightBoardState.
      Parameters:
      username - The username of the player whose ship board is being viewed.

    • viewTiles

      default void viewTiles()
      Views the tiles in the current game. This method is used to display the tiles available in the game.
